response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and identified the song "ABOVE BELOW" from the on-screen text in the lower third. I searched for "ABOVE BELOW" Nhato lyrics and found several sources confirming it is by hololive English -Justice- and sung in English. I mapped the scenes based on the transition to the musical performance at 03:13.
response.global_summary: The video features an animated introduction followed by a 3D musical performance of the song "ABOVE BELOW" by the group hololive English -Justice-.

scenes.description: Introductory sequence featuring 3D animated clips of the characters.
Musical performance of the song "ABOVE BELOW" by hololive English -Justice-. Credits for lyrics (monii) and music/arrangement (Nhato) appear in the lower-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Don't, don't know me, unpredictable-dictable
Takin' you all below, takin' you all be-
Don't, don't know me, irresistible-sistible
Takin' you all below, b-b-below we go.
They think they want it?
Show you somethin’ Real, my level no you’ll never know, as above so Below, you should know
So let’s go～. Just a little unpredictable, beautiful
Just the start, let’s get it, let’s get ‘em baby
Go, next level, almost criminal
As above so it goes below.
